description: Organize the homebrewing data and calculate the ABV for each batch using the formula ABV = (OG - FG) × 131.25. Apply conditional formatting to highlight batches within the target ABV range of 4.5-6.5% and save the result to /home/ga/Documents/homebrew_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with homebrewing fermentation data. Calculate the alcohol by volume (ABV) for each batch using the formula: ABV = (Original Gravity - Final Gravity) × 131.25. Then apply conditional formatting to highlight batches that fall within the target ABV range of 4.5% to 6.5%.
